alkylation reagent: 100 μL iodoacetamide was added to the filtrate
alkylation concentration: IAA was 100 mM in UA buffer
collision energy: The normalized collision energy was 30 eV
fractionation method: further purified by gel filtration chromatography
ionization type: The mass spectrometer was operated in positive ion mode
labeling: proteomic analyses of Ba168 were performed using high-resolution LC-MS/MS
